title: Ecosystem Fundamentals
summary: The product and ecosystem lens for Arcium: what the network is trying to unlock, why builders care, and how to read the current market landscape around confidential compute.

bodySections.title: What this category covers
bodySections.body: Ecosystem Fundamentals explains the role Arcium plays in the broader market. Instead of focusing on implementation detail first, it frames the network in terms of user problems, builder incentives, and the product categories where confidentiality changes what can be built.

bodySections.title: How to read the atlas
bodySections.body: Use this category when you want breadth. The linked articles establish the core narrative, the glossary fills in the vocabulary, and the ecosystem routes show how those ideas surface in concrete products.

bodySections.title: Questions it should answer
bodySections.body: A strong ecosystem guide should make it easier to answer three questions: what Arcium enables, where confidentiality matters enough to justify new infrastructure, and which builders are already turning that capability into user-facing products.

description: The product and ecosystem lens for Arcium.
